title: Fragment
description: Fragment, before 1975. Iran or Iraq, in the style of the Buyid period (945–1055) or Seljuq period (1037–1194). Silk: lampas weave; overall: 38.5 x 67 cm (15 3/16 x 26 3/8 in.). The Cleveland Museum of Art, Gift of The Textile Arts Club and Andrew R. and Martha Holden Jennings Fund, 1975.38
